message:

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-901-request-for-opentelemetry-jvm-monitoring-working-group",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry: Request for OpenTelemetry JVM Monitoring Working Group",
+    "description": "Request for OpenTelemetry JVM Monitoring Working Group. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentelemetry deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentelemetry version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nhelm list -n opentelemetry 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentelemetry installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry\n```\nThe Java instrumentation SiG current owns all forms of instrumentation across Java applications."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Request for OpenTelemetry JVM Monitoring Working Group",
+        "description": "> It's not me that mentioned Micrometer in the list 🤷 . Maybe you can arrange 2 meetings? I have no idea, I'm not responsible for arranging these meetings. I'm just pointing out that one hand you want a Micrometer expert but on the other hand when the lead of that project chimed in you told him that he can't join.\n\nWhen did I say that he can't join? These are public meetings, scheduled at a time convenient for the largest number of engineers who are actively committing time and resources to\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Request for OpenTelemetry JVM Monitoring Working Group\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "> It's not me that mentioned Micrometer in the list 🤷 . Maybe you can arrange 2 meetings? I have no idea, I'm not responsible for arranging these meetings. I'm just pointing out that one hand you want a Micrometer expert but on the other hand when the lead of that project chimed in you told him that he can't join.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
